projects.title: Flowy, associates management tool
projects.description: Flowy is a real-time workforce management system used across multiple Amazon departments. It enables 24-hour shift planning with live WebSocket updates, handling complex scheduling logic for onboarded teams. Built with enterprise-grade CI/CD pipelines, robust cloud infrastructure, and a focus on reliability at scale.

projects.title: Private Coach, AI cycling coaching platform
projects.description: An AI-powered cycling coaching SaaS that processes Garmin FIT files, syncs with Intervals.icu via OAuth, and delivers personalised training insights using Google Gemini. Features include interactive GPS maps, power zone analytics, CTL/ATL/TSB tracking, a library of 1,000+ structured workouts, AI-generated weekly training plans, and real-time coaching chat.

projects.title: Imopeksis, educational knowledge platform
projects.description: A full-stack educational platform built as my honours project at Edinburgh Napier University, achieving the best result and best project in a cohort of 30+ students. Features 50+ curated articles with audio streaming, audience segmentation for teachers, parents, and coaches, full-text search, and an Express API with a Vue 3 frontend.

projects.title: Data Analyst Intern under Gareth Williams, Co-Founder of Skyscanner
projects.description: During my Saltire Scholar internship under Gareth Williams, Co-Founder of Skyscanner, I analysed government procurement procedures to identify inefficiencies and leveraged AI-driven solutions to streamline data collection, categorisation, and synthesis. Delivered clear, actionable reports that enhanced stakeholder decision-making while gaining valuable insights into entrepreneurial strategy and cross-functional collaboration.

projects.title: Aquati.co.uk
projects.description: A WordPress e-commerce platform built and maintained for Aquati Ltd, a UK-based water solutions provider. The site features secure WooCommerce payments, SEO-optimised product pages, responsive design across all devices, and cloud hosting. Designed in Figma and delivered end-to-end from branding to deployment.
